executiveSummary: Iteration 000006 is largely complete and compliant with the PRD. All five user stories are implemented and verifiable. One partial non-conformance exists in FR-5 (intentional backward-compat filename exception for default single-size). Actionable recommendations applied: Windows portability fix in zikon-skills/index.js, FR-5 naming exception documented in AGENTS.md, visual-verification reminder added to AGENTS.md release checklist. Test splitting deferred as technical debt.
minorObservations: FR-5 backward-compat exception: single default-size (1024) uses '<slug>.svg' not '<slug>_1024.svg'; documented in AGENTS.md.
US-005-AC04 manual visual verification is not automatable; release checklist entry added to AGENTS.md.
rewrite_svg_dimensions() assumes square output; appropriate for current 1024x1024 PNG but noted for future non-square needs.
Windows portability: spawnSync('which', ['zikon']) replaced with cross-platform detection in zikon-skills/index.js.
test_zikon.js mixes multiple iteration tests; splitting deferred as technical debt.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: Implementation meets all iteration 000006 goals. Applied fixes: Windows portability in skill, AGENTS.md documentation of FR-5 naming exception and visual-verification release checklist. Deferred: test file splitting into per-iteration files.

refactorPlan.title: Fix Windows portability in zikon-skills/index.js
refactorPlan.description: Replace spawnSync('which', ['zikon']) with cross-platform detection using process.platform.

refactorPlan.title: Document FR-5 naming exception in AGENTS.md
refactorPlan.description: Add note that default single-size (1024) produces <slug>.svg without size suffix for backward compatibility.

refactorPlan.title: Add visual-verification reminder to AGENTS.md release checklist
refactorPlan.description: Add checklist entry requiring manual Markdown rendering verification before merging documentation changes.

refactorPlan.title: Split test_zikon.js by iteration
refactorPlan.description: Extract IT-000006 tests into tests/test_zikon_it000006.js; continue pattern for future iterations.
